name: Florentine Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg (I didn't have any.)
1 package (10 oz.) frozen chopped spinach, thawed and pressed dry (I used fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 9 x 1 1/4 inches with Pam.
3. Mix rice, Parmesan cheese, green onion tops, and egg white in a bowl using a fork. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of the pie plate, ensuring there are no holes.
4. Bake for 5 minutes.
5. Beat the egg whites until they become glossy peaks. Stir in the shredded White Cheddar Tofu, skim milk, sliced green onions, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
6. Pour the mixture into the rice shell.
7. Bake for about 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
6 servings.
